Testosterone Levels Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a testosterone levels test? 
A testosterone levels test measures the amount of the hormone Â testosterone in a sample of your blood. Hormones are chemical messengers in your bloodstream that control the actions of certain cells or organs.
Though often considered a male sex hormone, testosterone is present in females in smaller amounts. In both se
